name: solo practitioners in law firms processing 5–15 case files/month tool
description: For solo practitioners in law firms processing 5–15 case files/month, inefficient conversion causes delays in court submissions. We automate the conversion instead of manual conversion of case files.
target_audience: solo practitioners in law firms processing 5–15 case files/month
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of legal case files into electronic formats.
